long_description: COS observed 500's across US-East with root cause error IAM.
short_description: Customers in US-East might observe 500's for root cause error IAM
close_notes: The issue was traced an Akamai incident which has since resolved
customer_facing_impact: Users may have experienced some 500 Errors on authentication endpoints, preventing them from  completing actions requiring authentication
